title: Fatehgarh Fort
tagline: Fatehgarh Fort — heritage city of Uttar Pradesh

overview.short: Fatehgarh, Uttar Pradesh, India derives its name from an old fort.
overview.description: Fatehgarh, Uttar Pradesh, India derives its name from an old fort. Fatehgarh remained a military station of considerable importance, and in 1802, it became the headquarters of the Governor General's Agent for the ceded provinces. In 1815, a gun carriage factory was established here.

topPlaces.name: Fatehgarh
topPlaces.description: Fatehgarh is a cantonment town in Farrukhabad district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. Located on the south bank of the Ganges River, it is the administrative headquarters of Farrukhabad District.

topPlaces.name: Battle of Farrukhabad
topPlaces.description: The Battle of Farrukhabad also called the Battle of Fatehgarh was an engagement during the Second Anglo-Maratha War between forces of the East India Company and the forces of Jaswantrao Holkar of the Maratha Empire.

topPlaces.name: Farrukhabad
topPlaces.description: Farrukhabad is a city in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is the administrative headquarters of the Farrukhabad tehsil.

items.note: Fatehgarh is a cantonment town in Farrukhabad district in the state of Uttar Pradesh, India. Located on the south bank of the Ganges River, it is the administrative headquarters of Farrukhabad District.

The Battle of Farrukhabad also called the Battle of Fatehgarh was an engagement during the Second Anglo-Maratha War between forces of the East India Company and the forces of Jaswantrao Holkar of the Maratha Empire.
Farrukhabad is a city in the Indian state of Uttar Pradesh. It is the administrative headquarters of the Farrukhabad tehsil.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Fatehgarh Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Fatehgarh Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Fatehgarh Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kanpur Airport (127 km) and the nearest railway station is Bareilly Junction (112 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Fatehgarh Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Fatehgarh Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Fatehgarh Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Fatehgarh Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Fatehgarh Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Fatehgarh, Battle of Farrukhabad, Farrukhabad.
